member.name: T:JSServer.My.Resources.Resources
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.name: P:JSServer.My.Resources.Resources.ResourceManager
member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:JSServer.My.Resources.Resources.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

members.member: コンストラクタ
読込み

member.name: T:JSServer.SftpService
member.summary: SftpService - SFTP Utility Class

member.name: M:JSServer.SftpService.#ctor(System.String,System.Int32,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Standard constructor for username/password authentication

member.name: M:JSServer.SftpService.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Standard constructor for username/certificate authentication
member.param: Private key password, String if password needed, Nothing if not password protected

member.name: M:JSServer.SftpService.ConvertToUnsecureString(System.Security.SecureString)
member.summary: Utility method to get string from SecureString
member.param: SecureString to convert to unsecured String

member.name: M:JSServer.SftpService.CreateSessionOptions
member.summary: Shared function to configure connection (to be called once only)

member.name: M:JSServer.SftpService.DeleteFile(System.String)
member.summary: Delete a specific file
member.returns: True if successfully deleted or False otherwise

member.name: M:JSServer.SftpService.ListFiles
member.summary: List files from current directory
member.returns: RemoteFileInfoCollection with result and list of files

member.name: M:JSServer.SftpService.ListFiles(System.String)

summary.para: List files from specific directory (usually complete starting at root /home/user/folder, etc)

member.param: Remote server path or Nothing to list current directory
member.returns: RemoteFileInfoCollection with result and list of files

member.name: M:JSServer.SftpService.UploadFile(System.String)
member.summary: Upload a file to the remote server
member.param: Local fully qualified path to the file to upload

member.name: M:JSServer.SftpService.UploadFile(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Upload a file to the remote server with a specified remote path
member.param: Local fully qualified path to the file to upload
Remote path to put file or different name to use for upload

member.summary: DoWorkイベントハンドラで設定された結果

member.summary: 進行状況ダイアログで使用しているBackgroundWorkerクラス
